name: Kazuki Kurusu
description:
HI. I AM LATE AND JM SORRY. but this is a request from @herb. !! Thank you very very much !! I finished BD (Buddy Daddies) Awhile ago and I absolutely LOVE THEM SO MUCH.

QUICK WARNING,, this is like... improv full on 😭😭 so it definitely might be really really bad :( BUT I DO HOPE YOU GUYS LIKE THIS !!!! Kazuki MAY be out of character, and it may not work perfectly so please please please do tell me if something is wrong or if it doesn't work and I will try my best to fix it :) again thank you so so much for thr request and enjoy <3

another thing, have been getting into SPN (supernatural) and I LOVE LOVE LOVE Sam. possibly might start making self indulgent Sam bots... >:)
creator: sleepingbunny
